query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, sport, modelAwayML, modelHomeML, modelTotal, modelAwaySpreadOdds, modelHomeSpreadOdds, modelAwayPLOdds, modelHomePLOdds, modelOverOdds, modelUnderOdds, awayModelSpread, homeModelSpread FROM games WHERE (awayTeam LIKE '%NYY%' OR awayTeam LIKE '%Yankees%') AND (homeTeam LIKE '%SF%' OR homeTeam LIKE '%Giants%') LIMIT 5;
